creator: leres@freebsd.org
text: The BARNYARD option was deprecated because the BRO option in security/barnyard was deprecated because security/bro used net/GeoIP which was deprecated. security/bro has been converted to use net/libmaxminddb (GeoIP 2 format) and is no longer deprecated. PR 235723 undeprecates the BRO option in security/barnyard and this patch undeprecates the BARNYARD option in security/snortreport.
